article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.3.3. 14790 Burnaby Housing Agreement Bylaw (6616 Telford Avenue) 2026 (FA).pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to vote on housing agreement for 6616 Telford Avenue rental development
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would authorize a formal housing agreement with the developer of 6616 Telford Avenue, locking in rules for 388 rental units — 304 of which must be rented at below-market or capped rates to eligible tenants in perpetuity.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council adoption vote — this agreement will be registered on the property title and bind all future owners.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Housing Agreement Bylaw 14790 — council adoption vote scheduled

briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Construction & Development, Tenant
